ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the index used for pricing */,
  "maturity_length" TEXT /* Length of the maturity period (e.g., 10Y) */,
  "cms_cpn_pricer" INTEGER /* Indicates if the instrument is priced using CMS coupon pricing */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Asset class of the financial instrument (e.g., bond, derivative) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was issued */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Entity that issued the financial instrument */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Annual coupon rate for bonds */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is denominated */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the instrument */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the instrument details were updated */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pricing model used for the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES pricing_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index (e.g., EuriborSwapIsdaFixA10Y) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how the index is calculated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the index is denominated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the index details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the pricing model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the pricing model (e.g., Black-Scholes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of pricing model (e.g., option pricing, bond pricing) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the model details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market condition entry */,
  "market_rate" REAL /* Current market rate applicable to instruments */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the market rate was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market rate (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the market condition was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, compliance) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN of the financial instrument involved in the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction was executed */,
  "counterparty" TEXT /* Counterparty involved in the transaction */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction will be settled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_isin FOREIGN KEY ("isin") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("isin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN of the financial instrument in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the instrument held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the instrument */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current market value of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "last_valuation_date" TEXT /* Last date when the portfolio was valued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_isin FOREIGN KEY ("isin") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("isin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being checked */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the compliance status (if non-compliant) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the compliance check */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance check was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN of the financial instrument modified */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the field that was changed */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_isin FOREIGN KEY ("isin") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("isin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN of the financial instrument */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the instrument */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the price became effective */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pricing model used for the price */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., internal model, market data feed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_history_isin FOREIGN KEY ("isin") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("isin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES pricing_models ("model_id")
)
